# gfort2py Agent Instructions

## Project

gfort2py is a Python library for reading Fortran module files. It parses `.mod` files generated by gfortran and exposes the Fortran types, variables, and procedures to Python.

## Change Philosophy

Prefer minimal, focused changes. Every change should have a corresponding test case added or updated.

## Testing

Always run pytest after making code changes:

```sh
pytest
```

## Linting

Always run `lint.sh` after making any code changes:

```sh
bash lint.sh
```

Run linting before considering any change complete.

## Type Checking

Use mypy to enforce type checking:

```sh
mypy gfort2py
```

Run mypy after making code changes and fix any type errors before considering a change complete.
